_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The 0/36 base rate of ±2+ score moves in 12h windows makes HOLD the statistically honest call — the coil breaker is either a score climb above 38 (confirming Anxiety/Disbelief arrival) or a funding flip negative plus DXY spike above 102 (confirming Panic resumption).
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst says HOLD with medium conviction citing coil base rates; narrative implies directional LONG with high conviction citing the August 2024 analog; the split is base-rate discipline vs analog conviction.
next_move.confirmed_if: Fear/Greed score climbs above 38 with sustained ETF inflows and BTC funding stays positive
next_move.invalidated_if: DXY breaks above 102, VIX spikes above 22, or funding flips sharply negative with BTC closing below $62K
